name: WPA National Days Knowledge Layer
description: Specialized national days layer for all countries and protocol entities in the WPA Symbols & Protocol Lab.

coverage_goal.target: all countries and protocol entities in the WPA Symbols & Protocol Lab
coverage_goal.expected_count: 197 entries in the public module context
coverage_goal.coverage_note: National day data must be treated as a dedicated verified dataset, not as free-form generated knowledge.

language_rules.date_format_iso: MM-DD when year-independent; YYYY-MM-DD when current-year specific

when_user_asks_specific_country: Give the official name of the day
Add protocol note for ceremony use
Mention if anthem/flag use is customary
Mark as pending verification if not verified
when_user_asks_today: List countries/entities whose national day is today
If none in verified dataset, say none found in verified dataset
when_user_asks_upcoming: List upcoming national days by date
Include next 7/30 days depending on query
Use verified dataset only or mark pending verification
when_user_asks_all: Return a clean table grouped by month or continent
Include date, country/entity, national day name, and verification status

accuracy_rule.if_uncertain: Потребна е проверка од официјален или авторитетен извор.
accuracy_rule.variable_holidays: Variable holidays must be verified for the requested year.
accuracy_rule.multiple_national_days: If a country has multiple official national/state days, list all verified official days and identify the main protocol day when known.
accuracy_rule.current_year_check: For today's and upcoming national days, verify date logic against the current year.

sensitive_entities_rule.mandatory_disclaimer_mk: Овој модул е образовна и протоколарно-референтна алатка. Не претставува официјален акт на дипломатско признавање или правно утврдување на статус.

source_priority: official government calendar or ministry page
United Nations protocol references where applicable
official national statistics or government portal
authoritative encyclopedic references only for stable background
